steps.name: hit-testing-accessible-selection
steps.summary: Added renderer-independent paint order, point/marquee hit testing, selection reduction, traversal, and multi-selection bounds in packages/canvas-core/src/interaction.ts. CanvasSurface now delegates stable DOM IDs to canonical select-nodes operations for click, Shift toggle, marquee, Escape, and arrow traversal, with canonical focus/ARIA state. Verified canvas-core 22/22, agent-design 9/9, and both builds.

steps.name: move-resize-transaction
steps.summary: Added transform-nodes as one invertible operation for multi-node bounds, plus zoom-adjusted move, 8-handle group resize, minimum size, cancellation, locked-node rejection, and alignment-guide derivation in canvas-core. CanvasSurface now keeps transient preview outside canonical history, commits on pointerup only, reverts pointercancel/Escape, and feeds the same guide geometry to WebGPU and DOM editor planes. Verified core 26/26, app 10/10, both builds, preview revision stability, one operation per gesture, and undo/redo.

steps.name: reparent-reorder-responsive-constraints
steps.summary: Added core drop planning for inside/before/after ancestry, sibling reorder, post-removal indices, and cycle/locked/instance-boundary rejection. Reparent operations now atomically preserve optional final bounds and invert hierarchy/bounds together, while layout mode and fixed/hug/fill sizing remain unchanged. CanvasSurface renders hierarchy paint order, supports valid native drag reparent with drop feedback, and Alt+Arrow sibling reorder. Verified core 32/32, app 11/11, both builds, structure round-trip, responsive sizing cases, and UI drop/reorder.

steps.name: typed-properties-korean-text
steps.summary: Added kind-aware typed property schemas and validated set-node-property operations for code props, instance overrides, variants, token bindings, and layout, plus document token mode and invertible update-text operations. The inspector validates before commit and edits name/layout/sizing/props/variants/tokens/mode. Text surfaces hold a DOM-local draft during composition and commit exactly one update-text at compositionend or blur. Verified core 35/35, app 13/13, both builds, invalid-input rejection, and synthetic Korean composition revision/undo behavior; OS Microsoft IME remains for Step 5 live verification.

steps.name: integrated-5k-quality-proof
steps.summary: Automated evidence is complete: core 35/35, app 13/13, builds and DESIGN lint pass; system Chrome WebGPU active; fresh 5k pointer-to-paint p95 7.8/13.3/13.0ms with revision delta 1; keyboard focus order, forced DOM fallback, reparent, typed property/mode, Korean Chrome text entry, save/reload undo/redo, zero pixel diff, and zero console errors pass. Genuine Windows Microsoft IME manual composition was not verified and was explicitly waived by the user on 2026-07-10; synthetic composition regression remains covered.
